name: Windows Filtering Platform Blocked Connection From EDR Agent Binary
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: @gott_cyber
SIGMA Title: Windows Filtering Platform Blocked Connection From EDR Agent Binary
SIGMA Description: Detects a Windows Filtering Platform (WFP) blocked connection event involving common Endpoint Detection and Response (EDR) agents.
Adversaries may use WFP filters to prevent Endpoint Detection and Response (EDR) agents from reporting security events.


False positives:
- Unlikely

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=5157 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\amsvc.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\cb.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\cetasvc.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\cntaosmgr.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\cramtray.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\crssvc.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\csfalconcontainer.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\csfalconservice.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\cybereasonav.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\cylancesvc.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\cyserver.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\cyveraservice.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\cyvrfsflt.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\eiconnector.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\elastic-agent.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\elastic-endpoint.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\endpointbasecamp.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\executionpreventionsvc.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\filebeat.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\fortiedr.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\hmpalert.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\hurukai.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\logprocessorservice.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\mcsagent.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\mcsclient.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\msmpeng.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\mssense.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\ntrtscan.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\pccntmon.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\qualysagent.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\repmgr.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\reputils.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\repux.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\repwav.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\repwsc.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\sedservice.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\sensecncproxy.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\sentinelservicehost.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\sentinelstaticengine.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\sentinelstaticenginescanner.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\sfc.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\sophos ui.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\sophosfilescanner.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\sophosfs.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\sophoshealth.exe%' LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\taniumcx.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\taniumdetectengine.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\tmbmsrv.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\tmccsf.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\wscommunicator.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\xagt.exe%') AQL filter query
